digest.component_or_area: op-cert merge-gate verification CI lane (mirrors verify-identity gate)
propositions: Add a required-environment op-cert verification lane (rebar verify-opcert) that reuses the verify-identity merged-log walk and config-driven posture/boundary instead of a parallel walker.

The gate walks the merged log, groups events by ticket, and for each in-scope ticket verifies its completion-verifier op-cert, exiting 1 iff an enforced ticket lacks a valid required-environment op-cert.
Grandfathering for missing op-certs anchors enforcement on the introducing commit of the ticket's terminal close STATUS event compared against verify.opcert_enforce_since.
The verifier must recompute material_fingerprint from authoritative ticket state and take merged_log_commit only from the signature-verified payload, constrained to be an ancestor of gated HEAD.
Era key-validity must be evaluated at the cert's storage anchor S (the SIGNATURE event's introducing commit) rather than the self-chosen merged_log_commit, to prevent revoked-key rollback attacks.
Trusted-environment era boundaries become tickets-branch log positions stamped by a rebar trusted-env add|revoke helper, with unresolvable anchors and legacy main-SHA fields failing closed.
